description: Wholesale cost per 12V LiFePO4 SLI battery (60Ah, 0.77kWh). Includes integrated BMS. Currently 4-6x lead-acid cost but declining 15-18%/year. Crossover expected 2028-2032 by region.
source: CBB Battery, Made-in-China.com wholesale (MOQ 100), Jan 2026. China: 60Ah LFP $150-220. Projected 15-18% annual decline following pack-level learning rates. BMS costs declining with scale.
